subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! When the Tongue of Grandeur and Glory addresseth thee and saith: "Blessed art thou, and blessed is she that nursed thee, and the loins..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین اذا یخاطبک لسان العظمه و الجلال و یقول طوبی لک و لام رضعتک و لصلب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
